headline: BofA and Evercore ISI Cut C.H. Robinson (CHRW) Targets, See Margin Pressure but Recovery Ahead
summary: C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. (NASDAQ:CHRW) is included among the 15 Best Consistent Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 27, BofA analyst Ken Hoexter lowered the firm’s price recommendation on C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. (NASDAQ:CHRW) to $219 from $225. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares.
